mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_location_jobs ( id, user_id, source_url, platform, status, python_job_id, language, request_payload, result_payload, error_code, error_message, created_at, started_at, completed_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{sourceUrl}, #{platform}, #{status, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.SocialLocationJobStatus}, #{pythonJobId}, #{language}, #{requestPayload}, #{resultPayload}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE social_location_jobs SET source_url = #{sourceUrl}, platform = #{platform}, status = #{status, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.SocialLocationJobStatus}, python_job_id = #{pythonJobId}, language = #{language}, request_payload = #{requestPayload}, result_payload = #{resultPayload}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM social_location_jobs WHERE python_job_id = #{pythonJobId} LIMIT 1
